title: Monday Expert preferably based in Melbourne
excerpt:
Hi!

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
We are a leather, car interior shop slowly branching into other areas, we have been using Monday for a while but would really love an expert come and help us create the ultimate seamless system, we need it to be able to deal with order input, inventory, material ordering, invoicing (With or without Xero we aren’t sure of capability’s) and also workshop projects.
If you can help us out please reach out we would love some help in getting this sorted.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BNBLEATHER! Welcome to the monday community!

I’d love to sit down and talk through the details of your needs and use-case. I have worked with many different companies and industries setting up monday.com to meet their custom workflows.

I have experience using monday for both in Inventory management (integrations with Shopify or other as needed) & integrating with Xero for invoicing or budget tracking.

If you’d like to discuss more please schedule a call with me here and we can discuss your details and pricing: Calendly - Tim Little

Best Regards!

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BNBLEATHER

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in helping business’s maximise the power of their monday account, as well as building custom integrations, range of various workflows and app to make them even more powerful.

Please book in a complimentary session here.

It would be a pleasure to assist you and help you and your team achieve the most out of monday.com

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @BNBLEATHER and welcome to the monday.com community forums. There are some great partners within the community and I’m sure you will find the right one to assist you. CarbonWeb works with monday users to tailor their environment component-by-component and have done some custom inventory management and project management systems.

I’d be happy to discuss more if you would like to schedule a time: Consultation - Ricky

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! We are a small and passionate team that loves working with monday.com. If you’d like to have a free one-hour consultation just send me and email at jenna@iointegration.com.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BNBLEATHER

Welcome to the monday community!

I would suggest you get in touch with certified monday.com consultants based out of Melbourne who could help you in setting up monday com for managing order input, material ordering, inventory, invoicing, and workshop-related projects. With the help of an expert, you can streamline workflows in monday Work OS and manage your day-to-day tasks more effectively.

Regards
Neelam B
